singular_series_lower_bound.statement: for all even n > threshold, coefficient <= singularSeries(n)

raw_normalized_error_bound.statement: for all even n > threshold, |((RawVonMangoldtGoldbachSum(n) - singularSeries(n) * n) / (singularSeries(n) * n))| <= relativeError

non_prime_prime_power_weight_sum_bound.statement: for all even n > threshold, NonPrimePrimePowerVonMangoldtWeightSum(n) <= weightSumBound(n)

contamination_dominated.statement: for all even n > threshold, 2 * weightSumBound(n) * log n < (1 - relativeError) * coefficient * n
